Context: Modifying the sidebar of the 'Strategic Consulting Intelligent Support' platform to a light theme.
Edit request: Update the sidebar from a dark theme to a light theme (white background). 
- Sidebar Background: Solid white (#FFFFFF) with a very thin light gray border (#E5E8ED) on the right.
- Logo Area: The logo text and icon should now be dark to contrast against the white background.
- Navigation Menu: 
  - Menu group titles (like '研究体系') should be light gray.
  - Inactive menu items: Dark gray text (#333333) with muted icons.
  - Active menu item ('科技实体清单'): Use a light cyan/lake blue background (#E6F7FF) for the entire menu item row. Add a prominent 4px wide vertical lake blue stripe on the far left edge. The text and icon for the active item should change to the primary lake blue color (#00A3D9).
- Bottom User Profile (in Sidebar): Change the background from dark teal to a very light gray or subtle blue tint, with dark text.
- Consistency: Maintain the white header, light gray main background, and all existing card layouts/table styles from the previous version.

您是否还想看看这个浅色侧栏在折叠状态下的样子，或者是针对列表中的“操作”按钮进行一些样式的优化？"},{"suggestion":"增加侧栏折叠后的图标展开态"},{"suggestion":"为表格操作项添加更多色彩区分（如“查看”为蓝色，“删除”为红色）"},{"suggestion":"设计一个右侧抽屉式的详细信息预览窗格"}]}

screens.prompt:
Title: 战略咨询智能支持 - 科技实体清单 (浅色侧栏版)
Context: Modifying the sidebar of the 'Strategic Consulting Intelligent Support' platform to a light theme.
Edit request: Update the sidebar from a dark theme to a light theme (white background). 
- Sidebar Background: Solid white (#FFFFFF) with a very thin light gray border (#E5E8ED) on the right.
- Logo Area: The logo text and icon should now be dark to contrast against the white background.
- Navigation Menu: 
  - Menu group titles (like '研究体系') should be light gray.
  - Inactive menu items: Dark gray text (#333333) with muted icons.
  - Active menu item ('科技实体清单'): Use a light cyan/lake blue background (#E6F7FF) for the entire menu item row. Add a prominent 4px wide vertical lake blue stripe on the far left edge. The text and icon for the active item should change to the primary lake blue color (#00A3D9).
- Bottom User Profile (in Sidebar): Change the background from dark teal to a very light gray or subtle blue tint, with dark text.
- Consistency: Maintain the white header, light gray main background, and all existing card layouts/table styles from the previous version.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.title: 战略咨询智能支持 - 科技实体清单管理

design.title: 战略咨询智能支持 - 科技实体清单 (浅色侧栏版)

outputComponents.text:
已按照您的要求，将左侧侧边菜单栏更新为浅色（白色背景）风格：

- **科技实体清单 (浅色侧栏版)**：侧栏背景现在改为纯白色，并带有细微的右边框。导航菜单使用深灰色文字，选中的“科技实体清单”模块采用了浅湖蓝色背景块和左侧明显的青蓝高亮条，整体视觉风格更加明亮、一致，符合现代政企级数据平台的简约专业感。

您是否还想看看这个浅色侧栏在折叠状态下的样子，或者是针对列表中的“操作”按钮进行一些样式的优化？

outputComponents.suggestion: 增加侧栏折叠后的图标展开态
为表格操作项添加更多色彩区分（如“查看”为蓝色，“删除”为红色）
设计一个右侧抽屉式的详细信息预览窗格
